transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete domestic scenes and accessible analogies enliven the argument, but repeated assurances, rhetorical prompts, categorical promises, and a redundant closing recap make the latter half feel programmatic.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete domestic scenes and accessible analogies enliven the argument, but repeated assurances, rhetorical prompts, categorical promises, and a redundant closing recap make the latter half feel programmatic.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Identical wording, sequencing, emphasis, examples, and closure necessarily produce the same craft strengths and weaknesses; there is no comparative mechanism separating the chapters.
